generateQRCode(String, int, int) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.QRCodeUtil
Generates a QR code Bitmap for the given content.
getAccountType() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the account type (e.g., Entrant, Organizer, Admin).
getAmount() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Gets the maximum capacity/amount of the event.
getCurrentUser() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.UserManager
Gets the currently logged-in user.
getDeclinedInvitations() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the list of invitations the user has declined.
getDescription() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Gets the event description.
getDeviceId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the unique device ID associated with the user.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant
Gets the email of the entrant.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the email address of the user.
getEntrantStatus() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Gets the entrant status for the current user (transient, not stored in Firestore).
getEvent_date() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Gets the event date.
getEventDeepLink() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Generates a deep link URL for this event, used in QR codes.
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant
Gets the event ID associated with this entrant.
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationItem
Gets the event ID associated with this notification.
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationLogItem
 
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.UserNotification
Gets the Firestore event ID associated with this notification, if any.
getEventName() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationItem
Gets the event name associated with this notification.
getEventName() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationLogItem
 
getEventName() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.UserNotification
Gets the name of the event this notification refers to.
getFirstName() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the first name of the user.
getFormattedEventDate() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Returns the event date formatted as "March 27, 2026" instead of "2026-03-27".
getFullName() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Returns the full name constructed from first and last name if available.
getGroupId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant
 
getGroupId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.NotificationItem
Gets the group ID associated with this notification.
getGroupId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.UserNotification
Gets the Firestore group ID associated with this notification, if any.
getHostId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Gets the ID of the user who created this event.
getHostName() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Returns the resolved display name of the event host.
getHostProfilePictureUrl() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Returns the resolved profile picture URL of the event host.
getId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Comment
Returns the Firestore document ID of this comment.
getId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant
Gets the entrant ID.
getId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Event
Gets the event ID.
getId() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the unique document ID from Firestore.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.UserManager
Gets the singleton instance of UserManager.
getInvitedEvents() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.Users
Gets the list of events the user has been invited to.

Returns the total number of notification log entries managed by this adapter.

Returns the total number of users managed by this adapter.

Returns the total number of events managed by this adapter.

Returns the total number of comments managed by this adapter.

Returns the total number of enrolled entrants managed by this adapter.
getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.EntrantAdapter
Returns the total number of items in the data set held by the adapter.
getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.eventsapp.RecipientAdapter
Returns the total number of recipients managed by this adapter.

Gets the last name of the user.

Extracts and returns just the display names from the recipients list.
